# mlorente.dev

> Manu Lorente's personal site. Engineer — infrastructure, platforms, and products.

## About

Manu Lorente is a platform engineer with 10+ years of experience across Spain, France, China, and the US. Background in hardware engineering (cleanroom semiconductor fab), firmware, backend systems, and cloud infrastructure. Currently focused on Kubernetes, IaC, and self-hosted platforms.

## Site Structure

- / — Homepage: projects, latest notes, GitHub activity
- /notes/ — Technical blog posts about platform engineering, homelab, Kubernetes, networking
- /tags/[tag]/ — Posts and projects filtered by technology tag
- /es/ — Spanish version of all pages (includes newsletter)

## Key Topics

Platform engineering, Kubernetes (K3s), Infrastructure as Code, Terraform, Ansible, Docker, Tailscale/Headscale VPN, DNS (Pi-hole, CoreDNS), observability (Grafana, Loki), security (Authelia, CrowdSec), homelab, self-hosting, MCP servers, Go, Python, TypeScript.

## Projects

- KubeLab: 5-node hybrid homelab IDP (K3s, VPN mesh, SSO, full observability)
- Hive: MCP server for Obsidian vault context (67-82% token reduction)
- Pollex: Local LLM English polisher on Jetson Nano
- ts-bridge: Tailscale userspace VPN tunnel (one binary, no admin)

## Contact

hey@mlorente.dev
